entries.desc: Conjure a path of shifting stone towards the target location, rooting enemies for 15 sec. Damage may cancel the effect.
Reinforce your scales, reducing damage taken by 30% . Lasts 12 sec.
Expunge toxins affecting an ally, removing all Poison effects.
Disintegrate channels 20% faster.
Wing Buffet's cooldown is reduced by 2 min.
Fly to an ally and heal them for 4,020, or heal yourself for the same amount.
Landslide's cooldown is reduced by 30 sec, and it can withstand 200% more damage before breaking.
Essence regenerates 5% faster.
Obsidian Scales has an additional charge.
Living Flame deals 3% more damage and healing.
Store 20% of your effective healing, up to 857. Your next damaging Living Flame consumes all stored healing to increase its damage dealt.
Your Living Flame and Emerald Blossom are 30% more effective on yourself.
You may reactivate Deep Breath within 3 sec after landing to travel back in time to your takeoff location.
Tail Swipe's cooldown is reduced by 2 min.
Hover increases your movement speed by 70% for the first 4 sec.
Cauterize an ally's wounds, removing all Bleed, Poison, Curse, and Disease effects. Heals for 1,330 upon removing any effect.
Casting Emerald Blossom or Verdant Embrace reduces the cast time of your next Living Flame by 40%.
Your Magic damage done is increased by 2%.
Compress time to make your next empowered spell cast instantly at its maximum empower level.
Your healing done and healing received are increased by 2%.
Disorient an enemy for 20 sec, causing them to sleep walk towards you. Damage has a chance to awaken them.
Azure Strike damages 1 additional enemy.
Magic damage taken reduced by 2%.
Your Stamina is increased by 6%.
Hover lasts 4 sec longer.
Emerald Blossom heals 2 additional allies.
Your Leech is increased by 2%.
Fire Breath's damage over time lasts 4 sec longer.
While above 75% health, your movement speed is increased by 10%.
Obsidian Scales surrounds you with a Renewing Blaze, causing 100% of the damage it prevented to be healed back over 8 sec.
Wing Buffet and Tail Swipe knock enemies further and daze them, reducing movement speed by 70% for 4 sec.
Emerald Blossom and Verdant Embrace instantly heal you for 760 when cast.
While flying during Deep Breath, 100% of damage you would take is instead dealt over 10 sec.
Direct damage from Fire Breath consumes absorb shields from enemies, dealing 4,535 additional Spellfrost damage to them.
Let out a bone-shaking roar at enemies in a cone in front of you, increasing the duration of crowd controls that affect them by 50% in the next 10 sec.
Renewing Blaze restores you more quickly, causing damage you take to be healed back over 4 sec.
Swoop to an ally and fly with them to the target location. Clears movement impairing effects from you and your ally.
Green spells restore 5% more health.
Redirect your excess magic to a friendly healer for 1 hour. When you cast an empowered spell, you restore 0.25% of their maximum mana per empower level. Limit 1.
Glide speed and height increased by 10%.
Fire Breath causes your next Living Flame to strike 1 additional target per empower level.
Oppressing Roar removes 1 Enrage effect from each enemy, and its cooldown is reduced by 30 sec.
Hover gains 1 additional charge.
Rescue increases movement speed by 100% and allows spells to be cast while moving for 3 sec.
Source of Magic increases the target's healing and damage done by 3%.
Deep Breath stuns enemies for 3 sec.
Bend time, allowing you and your allies within 40 yds to cast their major movement ability once in the next 10 sec, even if it is on cooldown.

Evoke a paradox for you and a friendly healer, allowing casting while moving and increasing the range of most spells by 100% for 10 sec.

Affects the nearest healer within 60 yds, if you do not have a healer targeted.
Conjure an updraft to lift you and your 4 nearest allies within 20 yds into the air, reducing damage taken from area-of-effect attacks by 20% and increasing movement speed by 30% for 8 sec.
Lob a ball of flame, dealing 1,524 Fire damage to your target and all enemies within 8 yds.
Your Living Flame has a 20% chance to cause an Essence Burst, making your next Disintegrate or Pyre cost no Essence.
Azure Strike has a 15% chance to cause an Essence Burst, making your next Disintegrate or Pyre cost no Essence.
Deep Breath's damage is increased by 20%.
Interrupt an enemy's spellcasting and prevent any spell from that school of magic from being cast for 6 sec.

Focus your energies to release a salvo of pure magic, dealing 4,131 Spellfrost damage to an enemy. Damages additional enemies within 25 yds when empowered.

I:   Damages 1 enemy.

II:  Damages 2 enemies.

III: Damages 3 enemies.
Pyre has a 15% chance to flare up and explode again on a nearby target.
Increases your maximum Essence to 6.

Erupt with draconic fury and exhale Pyres at 3 enemies within 25 yds.

For 18 sec, Essence Burst's chance to occur is increased to 100%.

Eternity Surge upgrades your next Azure Strike to Azure Sweep, damaging all nearby enemies and dealing 75% additional damage.

 Azure Sweep
Concentrate azure energy into your tail and sweep to release pure magic upon an enemy and nearby targets for 619 Spellfrost damage. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.
Disintegrate and Azure Strike deal 8% more damage.
Living Flame deals 113 damage over 12 sec to enemies, or restores 216 health to allies over 12 sec. Stacks 3 times.

Casting an empower spell extends the duration of Dragonrage by 5 sec.

Each time this occurs during Dragonrage, its effectiveness is reduced by 25%.
Essence Burst stacks 2 times.
Living Flame deals 10% increased damage and healing and its cast time is reduced by 0.3 sec.
Fire Breath deals 20% more damage.
The critical strike chance of your spells is increased by 2%.
Eternity Surge hits twice as many targets.
Eternity Surge deals 15% increased damage to your primary target.
Eternity Surge's cooldown is reduced by 3 sec.
While channeling Disintegrate your Fire Breath on the target deals damage 100% more often.
During Deep Breath and Dragonrage you gain the maximum benefit of Mastery: Giantkiller regardless of targets' health.
Your Blue damage increases the damage of your next Pyre by 2%, stacking 20 times.

Eternity Surge additionally releases a Shattering Star at your target that deals 50% more damage per empower level reached.

 Shattering Star
Exhale a bolt of concentrated power from your mouth at the target for 649 Spellfrost damage.

After casting 6 Pyres, your next Pyre will explode into a Firestorm.

 Firestorm
An explosion bombards the target area with white-hot embers, dealing 5,419 Fire damage to enemies over 10 sec.
Fire Breath damage has 16% chance to cause your next Living Flame to be instant cast, stacking 2 times.
Deep Breath's cooldown is reduced by 1 min.
Your damaging critical strikes deal 230% damage instead of the usual 200%.

Increases Shattering Star damage by 35%.

Shattering Stars are exhaled at all of your Eternity Surge targets.
Deep Breath reduces the Essence costs of your next 4 Disintegrates and Pyres by 1. Stacks up to 8 times.
Your empower spells' maximum level is increased by 1, and they reach maximum empower level 20% faster.
Essence Burst increases the damage of affected spells by 15.0%.
Disintegrate deals damage 25% more often, but deals 10% less damage.
Casting an empower spell increases your Essence regeneration rate by 100% for 4 sec.

Deep Breath deals 20% increased damage and can be cast again within 18 sec of being used.

Recall will be available after the second cast if talented.
Enemies affected by Fire Breath's damage over time effect take 25% increased damage from your Red spells.

Disintegrate reduces the remaining cooldown of your empower spells by 0.50 sec each time it deals damage.

Pyre reduces the remaining cooldown of your empower spells by 0.40 sec per enemy struck, up to 2.0 sec.
Disintegrate has a 15% chance each time it deals damage to launch a level 1 Eternity Surge at 40% power.
Casting an empower spell increases the damage of your next 2 spells of the same color by 20% within 10 sec.
While Dragonrage is active you gain Rising Fury every 6 sec, increasing your haste by 4%, stacking up to 5 times.

Deep Breath causes enemies to take 20% increased damage from Bombardments and Essence abilities for 12 sec.

The duration of this effect is extended when Deep Breath is cast multiple times.
Essence abilities extend Bombardments by 1 sec.
Bombardments have a chance to generate Essence Burst.
Obsidian Scales reduces damage taken by an additional 10%.
Knocking enemies up or backwards reduces their damage done to you by 15% for 8 sec.
For each second you are in combat, Azure Strike, Living Flame, and Disintegrate deal 1% increased damage, up to 15%.

Mass Disintegrate marks your primary target for destruction for the next 6 sec.

You and your allies have a chance to trigger a Bombardment when attacking marked targets, dealing 1,805 Volcanic damage split amongst all nearby enemies.
Empower spells cause your next Disintegrate to strike up to 3 targets. When striking fewer than 3 targets, Disintegrate damage is increased by 10% for each missing target.

Deep Breath can now be steered in your desired direction.

In addition, Deep Breath burns targets for 2,554 Volcanic damage over 12 sec.

The duration of this effect is extended when Deep Breath is cast multiple times.
While Hovering, damage taken from area of effect attacks is reduced by 10%.
Deep Breath resets a charge of Hover.
Entering combat grants a charge of Burnout, causing your next Living Flame to cast instantly.
Black spells deal 20% increased damage.
Bombardments reduce the cooldown of Deep Breath by 0.5 sec for each target struck, up to 1.5 sec.
Empower spells cause your next Eruption to strike up to 3 targets. When striking less than 3 targets, Eruption damage is increased by 10% for each missing target.
Essence abilities deal 15% additional damage.
Mass Disintegrate strikes 1 additional target.
While flying during Deep Breath you are assisted by a squadron of Dracthyr who assault enemies with Pyre, dealing 678 Fire damage to nearby enemies up to 8 times.
Living Flame and Azure Strike have 1 extra chance to trigger Essence Burst when they critically strike.

Disintegrate damage consumes 1.0 sec of Fire Breath from enemies it damages, detonating it for 150% of the amount consumed.

Pyre damage consumes 4 sec of Fire Breath from enemies it damages, detonating it for 115% of the amount consumed.
Fire Breath deals its damage 20% more often.
Obsidian Scales also applies to your target or 1 nearby injured ally at 50% value.
Your wounds have a small chance to cauterize, healing you for 30% of damage taken. Occurs more often from attacks that deal high damage.
Hover and Deep Breath travel 40% faster, and Hover travels 40% further.
Tail Swipe and Wing Buffet scorch enemies and blind them with ash, causing their next attack within 4 sec to miss.
Fire Breath's damage over time lasts 4 sec longer.
Fire Breath reaches its maximum empower level 20% faster.
Critical strike chance against targets above 50% health increased by 15%.
Fire Breath gains an additional charge.
Essence abilities are enhanced with Flame, dealing 20% of healing or damage done as Fire over 8 sec.
Fire Breath's damage over time is increased by 30%. Dream Breath's heal over time is increased by 30%.
Fire Breath's cooldown is reduced by 5 sec.
Twin Flame bounces to up to 2 additional targets.
Fire Breath has a 50% chance to generate Essence Burst.
Consuming Essence Burst fires a twin flame, striking your target for 684 Fire damage.
